differential_diagnoses: Common variable immunodeficiency (CVID) with associated enteropathy
next_steps: Urgent surgical consultation for resection of the aneurysmal and ischemic jejunal segments
Comprehensive histopathologic, immunohistochemical, and molecular analysis (including T-cell and NK-cell receptor gene rearrangement studies) of the resected tissue
Bone marrow biopsy and aspirate for evaluation of underlying lymphoproliferative disorder
Repeat peripheral blood flow cytometry to monitor the clonal NK-cell population
Serum protein electrophoresis and immunofixation to re-evaluate the M-protein
Genetic testing for primary immunodeficiency syndromes
